info.name: DOKU Malaysia API Collection
info.description:
**DOKU Malaysia Postman Collection** is a collection of Postman requests designed to help developers explore, test, and integrate with **DOKU Malaysia APIs**.

It provides ready-to-use examples for key API flows, including authentication, checkout, and payment processing, allowing developers to quickly understand request structures, required parameters, and expected responses.

item.name: Checkout API

request.description:
Generated from cURL: curl --location --request POST 'https://dev.your-api-server.com/v3/checkouts' \
--header 'Authorization: Base64(doku_ak_test_qblFNYngBkEdjEZ16jxxoWSM:)' \
--header 'Client-Id: BRN-001-0000001' \
--header 'Request-Timestamp: {{$date.isoTimestamp}}' \
--header 'Idempotency-Id;' \
--header 'Signature;' \
--header 'API-Version: arabica.2025-12-01' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--data-raw '{
    "id": "8fdC56eo-cC99-46E1-B6AC-4asD8755B25C",
    "order": {
        "amount": 100.05,
        "invoice_number": "INV-20210231-0001",
        "currency": "MYR"
    }
}'

Generated from cURL: curl --location 'https://api-sit.doku.com/v3/checkouts/1768276092408' \
--header 'Authorization: Basic YW55LWFwaS1rZXktMTIz' \
--header 'Client-Id: BRN-0204-1766128384799' \
--header 'Request-Timestamp: {{request_timestamp}}' \
--header 'API-Version: arabica.2025-12-01'

item.description:
Checkout is a payment service that allows you as DOKU merchants to use our payment system, where DOKU's payment page pops up on your website after checkout. This is the easiest and the quickest way to integrate with DOKU without any hassles that suitable for every business needs from small businesses to enterprises.  
  
Learn more [here](https://doku-developers.apidog.io/overview-1926303m0).

item.name: Payment API

request.description:
Generated from cURL: curl --location 'https://api-doku.com/v3/payments/internet-banking/banks' \
--header 'api-version: arabica.2025-06-19' \
--header 'Request-Target: {{request_target}}' \
--header 'Request-Timestamp: {{request_timestamp}}' \
--header 'Signature: {{signature}}' \
--header 'Idempotency-Id: test' \
--header 'Authorization: Basic dGVzdC1hcGktbWVueWFsYWFhYWEtMTIz' \
--header 'Client-Id: BRN-0216-1758091011041' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--data '{
    "payment_channel": "INTERNET_BANKING_FPX"
}'

Generated from cURL: curl --location 'https://api-sit.doku.com/v3/payments/1768275476502' \
--header 'Authorization: Basic YW55LWFwaS1rZXktMTIz' \
--header 'Client-Id: BRN-0204-1766128384799' \
--header 'Request-Timestamp: {{request_timestamp}}' \
--header 'API-Version: arabica.2025-12-01'

item.description:
The Payment API is a unified direct payment API that supports multiple payment channels through a single endpoint. Merchants specify the desired payment channel in the request payload, allowing full customization of the payment flow and user experience.  
  
Learn more [here](https://doku-developers.apidog.io/overview-1926304m0).

item.name: Cards Payment API

request.description:
| Header Parameter | Type | Description | | --- | --- | --- | | Client-Id | `string` | The Client ID you retrieved from Jokul Back Office
`MANDATORY` | | Request-Id | `string` | Random string that must unique per request for idempotency
`MANDATORY` `ALPHA NUMERIC` `40 chars` | | Request-Timestamp | `string` | Request time in ISO8601 format with UTC + 0
`MANDATORY` | | Signature | `string` | Security parameter to ensure the request's authenticity. Learn more how to generate Signature [here](https://jokul.doku.com/docs/docs/technical-references/generate-signature)
`MANDATORY`|

header.description: Merchant Client ID registered in DOKU
Unique identifier for each request (UUID v4 recommended)

request.description: Endpoint for H2H merchants to check 3D Secure eligibility on a credit card. Returns an authentication URL used to redirect the consumer to the 3DS challenge page.

header.description: Timestamp request on UTC time in ISO8601 UTC+0 format
HMACSHA256 from signature components, to generate signature please refer to [this](https://doku-developers.apidog.io/signature-component-from-request-header-1387601m0) page.
Unique ID for a partner (DOKU'S Client ID)
Unique random string (max 128 characters) generated from merchant side to protect duplicate request
(Required) Timestamp request on UTC time in ISO8601 UTC+0 format format
(Required) Unique ID for a partner (DOKU'S Client ID)
(Required) Numeric String. Reference number that should be unique in the same day (request-id)

request.description:
| Header Parameter | Type | Description | | --- | --- | --- | | Client-Id | `string` | The Client ID you retrieved from Jokul Back Office
`MANDATORY` | | Request-Id | `string` | Random string that must unique per request for idempotency
`MANDATORY` `ALPHA NUMERIC` `40 chars` | | Request-Timestamp | `string` | Request time in ISO8601 format with UTC + 0
`MANDATORY` | | Signature | `string` | Security parameter to ensure the request's authenticity. Learn more how to generate Signature [here](https://jokul.doku.com/docs/docs/technical-references/generate-signature)

exec: var invoiceNumber = 'INV-DIRECT-CC-192837465'; // Replace this with the Invoice Number or Request-Id as the query params

item.description: By using this Cards, your customers can pay their order with their credit card or any online transaction capable debit card. DOKU has partnered with various banks and principals (Visa, MasterCard) to provide a secure and seamless payment experience for your customers.
